title: Runtime Lifecycle State Machine — Boot, Workspace, Session, Execution, Recovery
context: Define the unified runtime state machine for the Tribunus application lifecycle: Instance Boot → Workspace Open → Project Attach → Session Start → Agent Execution → Artifact Production → Cockpit Projection → Suspend/Resume → Crash Recovery → Session Close. This ADR establishes the canonical states, valid transitions, crash recovery semantics, projection lifecycle, and suspend/resume contract. The runtime state machine is the outer nervous system within which the campaign state machine (lane lifecycle) and coordination kernel operate.
